name: Arion Celestia
sd_appearance: A tall, slender Aasimar with radiant golden hair cascading down to her waist and celestial blue eyes that seem to hold a hint of eternal wisdom, Arion is clad in pale blue scholar robes adorned with brass instrument clips and equipped with glass-lens goggles. Ink-stained hands and elbows reinforce her commitment to her role as Junior Archivist within the Glass Sigil. A staff rests on her shoulder, while multiple scroll cases and reading lenses are a testament to her ongoing pursuit of knowledge. A peculiar silver halo, a remnant of her celestial lineage, glimmers faintly, casting an ethereal light upon the countless forbidden texts she diligently studies.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
